scripts.dev:insecure: open -a 'Google Chrome' --args --disable-web-security --user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-dev-solax http://localhost:8080 & python3 -m http.server 8080 -d web
scripts.build:android: sh scripts/stamp-build.sh && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:ios: sh scripts/stamp-build.sh && npx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -project App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=- CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
